name: workerd-oxc
description: Oxc parser and transform adapter for Cloudflare workerd using direct WebAssembly modules.

scripts.build:parser: cargo build --manifest-path native/parser/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && cp native/parser/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/workerd_oxc_parser.wasm src/wasm/parser.wasm
scripts.build:transform: cargo build --manifest-path native/transform/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && cp native/transform/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/workerd_oxc_transform.wasm src/wasm/transform.wasm
scripts.build:wasm: npm run build:parser && npm run build:transform
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.workers.config.ts
